# Functions

::: callout
## Learning Objectives
+ 
+ 
+
:::


<!-- [10 minute] Motivation: copy paste code over and over from example in previous class -->
<!-- [20 minute lecture] Functions -->
<!-- Syntax -->
<!-- Arguments + Parameters (multiple)? -->
<!-- Debugging -- print(), run line by line, etc. -->

<!-- [30 minute Lab? Activity?] Write your first function (decoder vibe)? -->


<!-- [10 minute lecture] Input validation -->
<!-- [10 minute lecture] Environment + Scope + Name Masking + Dynamic Lookup -- activity based? give examples and ask them to identify where the values are pulled from? -->
